title: Committee for development of a model for sharing the motor vehicle database
full_text:
# **t11,1amw INSURANCE REGULATORY AND irJai DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY OF INDIA** 

## Ref: IRDA/NL/ORD/MISC/164/09/2015 

## Date: 07-09-2015 

## **Office Order** 

## **Re: Committee for development of a model for sharing the motor vehicle database** 

> It is expected that Insurance Information Bureau of India (11BI) would be in a position to obtain data from various national level entities such as Aadhar, MoRTH, State Government etc. which could be transferred to the Insurance Companies in a seamless manner subject to the concurrence/ agreement with the respective entities. Such sharing of data in a seamless manner could bring efficiencies in the insurance sales and services. More particularly, in relation to the Motor vehicles insurance there is scope for 

> improving the current system of data entry etc. by doing away with it. Some of these 

> entities are likely to press that further sharing of the data could be made for commercial use only on a revenue sharing model. 

following members: In view of the above, competent Authority hereby constitutes a committee with the 

1. Mr. Bhargav Das Gupta, CEO - ICICI Lombard - Chairman, 

11. Mr. Abhishek Dutta, Head- Motor, 11BI - Member 

- iii. Mr. A.Hoda, GM, United India Insurance - Member 

- iv. Mr. Anil Agarwal, Additional Director, Shriram General Insurance - Member, Convenor 

The committee constituted needs to work on the below tasks: 

- Developing a revenue sharing model in relation to Motor vehicle database that could be seamlessly transferred 

- 1. 

- ii. Suggest Billing and settlement frequency an~ es 

### Page **1** of **2**

> Parisharam Bhavan, 3rd Floor, Basheer Bagh, Hyderabad-500 004. India. Ph .: 91-040-2338 1100, Fax: 91-040-6682 3334 E-mail : irda@irda.gov.in Web.: www.irda.gov.in 

> 111. Any other related matter issues relating to the same. 

The committee shall submit its report within 4 weeks of its constitution. 

Sr. Joint Director-NL 

> Page **2** of **2**
